ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the student (M/F) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the student */,
  "guardian_name" TEXT /* Name of the student's guardian */,
  "guardian_contact" TEXT /* Contact details of the student's guardian */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the class */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the class */,
  "room_location" TEXT /* Location where the class is held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester during which the student is enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the class */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed, dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the grade */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class for which the grade is given */,
  "letter_grade" TEXT /* Letter grade awarded to the student */,
  "percent_grade" REAL /* Percentage grade awarded to the student */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date when the grade was recorded */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who assigned the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student attending the class */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class attended */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the class session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., lecture, lab, tutorial) */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who took the attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year of the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the teacher belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the teacher's office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment record */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class being taught */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher assigned to the class */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the teacher was assigned to the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_assignments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_assignments_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing feedback */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the feedback is about */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the student (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the student */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the report belongs to */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester for which the report is generated */,
  "overall_grade" TEXT /* Overall grade achieved by the student */,
  "attendance_rate" REAL /* Attendance rate for the semester */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the alert */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the alert (e.g., low grades, poor attendance) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved_status" TEXT /* Status indicating whether the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the account holder */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, teacher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
